calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Assistant District Attorney AMY SHEARER of the Office of the District Attorney of the the City and County of San Francisco (Tel: 415-553-1820) appearing for the petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE.

Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
